examples: We were tucked away in a secluded corner of the room.
Tiny secluded beaches can be found off the beaten track.
He lives in a secluded five-bedroom luxury villa.
This drives people like me off the beaten track and onto the more secluded walks.
The secluded compound is tucked behind gates, situated at the end of a winding 1, 800-foot-long driveway.
